memo: Clock: 21 hours remain on expedited track; no deadline risk. File: Complete; all three required documents (ED note, admission order, progress notes) present. Compliance: No errors; draft correctly applies MCR-INPT without substituting internal screening tools. Merits: Two-midnight expectation documented by admitting clinician. Clinical picture supports inpatient intensity: 79M with community-acquired pneumonia, SpO2 88%, CURB-65 3 (high risk), atrial fibrillation on anticoagulation, documented fall risk. Planned IV antibiotics, oxygen support, and monitoring are medically necessary inpatient services. All criteria in MCR-INPT satisfied. Cost share $0 is correct for Medicare inpatient admission. Draft approve is supported; proceed to finalize.
member_impact: Your hospital admission for pneumonia has been approved. You will be admitted as an inpatient to receive antibiotics by IV, oxygen therapy, and monitoring. Your care will be covered as medically necessary. You do not owe any out-of-pocket cost for this hospital stay.
recommended_actions: Finalize approval; issue coverage determination notice with member-plain-language explanation

citations.quote: Inpatient admission is appropriate when the admitting clinician reasonably expects the member to require medically necessary hospital care spanning at least two midnights, considering the member's history, comorbidities, severity of presentation, and risk of an adverse event.
An inpatient admission is generally appropriate when the admitting clinician expects the member to require hospital care that crosses two midnights

An inpatient admission review requires the emergency department or clinic note from presentation, the physician admission order with the admitting clinician's expectation of the length and intensity of care, and the clinical progress notes available at the time of review.
A Medicare Advantage plan must follow traditional Medicare coverage criteria: national coverage determinations, applicable local coverage determinations, and Medicare statutes and regulations.

findings.detail: File is complete: all 3 required documents for inpatient_admission are present.
Decision clock: 21 hours remain on the expedited track (due 2026-07-11T18:00:00Z). Prioritize this file.
